title: tetragonanthus longicornus
intro: Tetragonanthus longicornus, also known as the African pear or African plum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetragonanthus longicornus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and skin care. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
